---
title: "Bio"
description: "Academic biography, education history, and research areas."
lang: en
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

::: {.page-hero}
::: {.page-hero__content}
<p class="page-hero__eyebrow">Bio</p>

# Academic Biography

<p class="page-hero__meta">Academic title | Department / Institution</p>
<p class="page-hero__lede">
  This page is designed to present your academic identity, research approach,
  and educational background in readable content blocks. It aims for more than
  a short profile, but less than a dense CV.
</p>
:::
:::

::: {.bio-layout}
::: {.bio-main}
::: {.bio-section-card}
## Academic Biography

[Ad Soyad] works as [academic title] at [institution / department].
Research focuses on [core areas], [methods], and [applied contexts].
This section can be expanded into two or three paragraphs that summarize both
your scholarly profile and your research approach.

If a longer academic biography is needed for national or international contexts,
this page can easily be extended.
:::

::: {.bio-section-card}
## Research Interests

<ul class="detail-pills">
  <li>Research area / theme 1</li>
  <li>Research area / theme 2</li>
  <li>Research area / theme 3</li>
  <li>Methodological approach</li>
</ul>
:::

::: {.bio-section-card}
## Education

<ul class="timeline-list">
  <li>
    <span class="timeline-year">PhD</span>
    <strong>University Name</strong><br />
    Field / programme, year
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="timeline-year">MA / MSc</span>
    <strong>University Name</strong><br />
    Field / programme, year
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="timeline-year">BA / BSc</span>
    <strong>University Name</strong><br />
    Department, year
  </li>
</ul>
:::

::: {.bio-section-card}
## Awards, Roles, and Collaborations

<ul class="detail-list">
  <li>Optional award, grant, or research support</li>
  <li>Editorial role, committee membership, or coordination duty</li>
  <li>Research group, center, or network for collaboration</li>
</ul>
:::
:::

::: {.section-card .bio-side}
## Summary {#bio-summary-title}

::: {.bio-details}
::: {}
**Institution**  
University / research institution
:::

::: {}
**Department**  
Department or research unit
:::

::: {}
**Expertise**  
Academic field, subfield, or thematic specialization
:::

::: {}
**Languages**  
Turkish, English, others
:::
:::

<p class="page-note">
  The CV PDF area is ready. Add your file at <code>assets/files/cv.pdf</code>
  and activate the link below.
</p>

::: {.button-row}
[CV PDF coming soon](#){.button-link .disabled aria-disabled="true"}
:::
:::
:::
